items.summary: best gatcha game in the world. Please make a normal game of this

items.title: [正面] Lot of text and terms to get used to, but it defin...
items.summary: Lot of text and terms to get used to, but it definitely scratched that STS itch but with gacha/party building involved? Count me in. Game seems pretty F2p friendly as I'm only 4 hours in with a lot of that idle on tik tok xD and I already have 5 SSR and I only use 3 SSR and 1 SR in my team which goes to show certain SR can be valuable.

items.title: [正面] incredible art and character design, satisfying ga...
items.summary:
incredible art and character design, satisfying gameplay that doesnt feel convoluted or overly confusing
one of the best gachas out there imo, its free so why not give it a try :) 
i adore the lovecraftian aesthetic and world, its so beautifully bleak and brutal

items.title: [正面] its a surprisingly really good gacha game that doe...
items.summary: its a surprisingly really good gacha game that doesn't feel as tiring as other entries in the genre, it would help if the game got more traction so that it could get more funding. it has so much potential

items.title: [正面] I'm doing my part. Games great. Story so far great...
items.summary:
I'm doing my part. Games great. Story so far great. Music an orgasm.

I just hope, cause this game's story, art and ost are amazing, that the Dev's don't completely take down the game (being paranoid, i know) and modify it a bit to offer it as an offline experience. As Morimens isn't what one would call popular.
